content: Aspiration alters with changes in the position of the articulators (tongue, lips, jaw) during speech production. Factors like voicing, manner of articulation, and the surrounding phonetic context can also influence aspiration.
raw_content: Aspiration alters with changes in the position of the articulators (tongue, lips, jaw) during speech production. Factors like voicing, manner of articulation, and the surrounding phonetic context can also influence aspiration.
